name: AMERISAFE INC
summary: AMERISAFE, Inc. is a specialty workers compensation insurance holding company incorporated in Texas, focused on small to mid-sized employers in hazardous industries including construction, trucking, logging and lumber, agriculture, services, manufacturing, and maritime. Operating since 1986, it provides workers compensation coverage through three insurance subsidiaries (AIIC, SOCI, AIICTX), offering underwriting, safety services, claims management, and premium audit services across 27 active states.
